description: Compare the two classic allosteric states of human hemoglobin - the T-state (deoxy, PDB:4HHB) and R-state (oxy, PDB:1HHO) - by structural superposition of their alpha subunits. Quantify the conformational difference, produce a publication-quality overlay figure, and write a report documenting the RMSD and structural changes between states. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/hemo_superposition.png and the report to ~/PyMOL_Data/hemo_rmsd_report.txt.
